text:
(UM) Program. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: Y = Yes 
N = No 

COMMENT: Plans that elect to cover OTC drugs as part of general drug utilization management or part of a step 
therapy protocol have identified the applicable drugs and they appear in the OTC Drug file (which is 
delivered as part of the Formulary file). When OTC_UM_PROGRAM='Y' then the over-the-counter 
drugs that appear in the OTC Drug file are allowed by the plan. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
